name: The Orange
short_description: In a forgotten universe lies a legendary orange: the Orange of Infinity. Press it to shape existence itself and confront the darkness.
detailed_description:
In the sprawling depths of a forgotten universe, amidst cosmic wonders and celestial marvels, lies an enigmatic artifact: the Orange of Infinity. Legends whisper of its unfathomable power, a force capable of shaping the very fabric of existence itself. Yet, its secrets remain veiled, locked away within its radiant peel.

This game is a simple clicker game where you have to press an orange and try to break it into smaller pieces.


Features
- Steam achievements
- Orange
- Click
